key_finding: SEAR achieves real, substantial F1 reduction (52% relative) using perturbation magnitude 12-30x smaller than unconstrained baselines (FGSM/BIM/MIM), which approach the full epsilon budget across the entire image. This demonstrates the imperceptibility-efficiency trade-off central to confined, learned anti-forensic attacks versus brute-force adversarial methods — substantially more damage per unit of visual disturbance.
